case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. MARIA REFUGIO VEGA MARTINEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-05-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-04-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT MARIA REFUGIO VEGA MARTINEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT MARIA REFUGIO VEGA MARTINEZ IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATED THE MATTER HAS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
